rationale: The citing paper’s claimed contribution includes a joint dynamic advertising-sales model and Bayesian nonparametric modeling with Dirichlet process mixtures, which closely aligns with the cited paper’s core contribution of Bayesian nonparametric dynamic state-space methods using DPM in advertising contexts. This is an exact DOI match and the overlap is methodological (not just topical), so the citation is plausibly substantive rather than a generic mention.
